# Getting Support

## Documentation first

Before asking, check:

- [README.md](../README.md) — overview
- [INSTALL.md](../INSTALL.md) — installation per profile
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) — design decisions
- [INSTALL.md → Troubleshooting](../INSTALL.md#troubleshooting) — common issues

## Asking questions

- **Discussions** (https://github.com/Luispitik/cognito/discussions) — general questions, ideas, use-case sharing.
- **Issues** — only for reproducible bugs or specific feature requests (use the templates).

## Not for support

- Email — maintainers do not offer private 1-to-1 support for free usage.
- Security issues — use GitHub Security Advisories, not Discussions. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

## Response expectations

This is a community project maintained on best-effort. Typical response times:

- Issues with clear repro: 1–7 days
- Feature requests: weeks (triaged during minor-version planning)
- Discussions: peer-answered, no SLA

If you need priority support, consider forking and maintaining your own branch.
